summary: The CAS fix closes the lost-update bug, but the classification/skill/suppressContinuations fix is still behaviorally incomplete because the gateway endpoints continue to drop those fields before routing.

findings.title: Kanban routing metadata is still ignored at the `/chat` boundary, so the explicit `{taskType,tier}`/skill/continuation controls never reach `preRoute`
findings.recommendation: Thread the new request fields (`classification`, `skill`, `suppressContinuations`) through the `/chat` handlers into the routing path, or downgrade the kanban-side claim/tests to reflect that V1a still reclassifies from scratch. As written, `gatewayRunFn` sends the metadata, but both gateway `/chat` implementations only read `message` (and `channel` in `gateway.mjs`) and discard the rest.
